no: TB#Tweaks by the_bigg. Spell fixes, wish tweaks, 3E stat conversions, druid metal, stat training, difficulty system. Partially EE-compatible — WSPATCK, Backstab Visibility, and Mage Spellbook components require original engine.

conflicts.reason: APR progression and/or Grandmastery rule conflicts
Both modify Nature's Beauty blindness duration. tb#tweaks sets 8 hours, jtweaks sets 11 years. Choose one
conflicts.theirComps: #360 Nature's Beauty blindness can be cured

conflicts.reason: Redundant — SR cn:0 rewrites all spell files including SPPR704 (Nature's Beauty), Imprisonment, and Flesh to Stone/Petrification spells. TB cn:100 modifies sppr704.spl, cn:150 modifies imprisonment spells, cn:200 patches ALL .spl files for petrification effects. TB does NOT detect SR. If SR installed first, TB patches SR-modified spells (harmless but pointless). If TB installed first, SR overwrites TB's changes entirely. Removed cn:100/150/200 .
conflicts.myComps: #100 Nature's Beauty Tweak #150 Imprisonment Fix #200 Flesh to Stone Fix
conflicts.source: SR replaces SPPR/SPWI files wholesale; TB cn:200 uses COPY_EXISTING_REGEXP on all .spl; TB has no SR detection, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: TB 3E stat components (cn:4000-6500) modify strmod/dexmod/hpconbon.2da using 3E formulas. ToF cn:80000 (Ability Score Modifiers) also rewrites these same 2DAs. Last installed wins — ToF overwrites TB. TB cn:7000 (Druids metal) modifies item usability flags — no overlap with ToF cn:40000 (class/race requirement 2DAs, different files). TB cn:7550 (Gain Stats) modifies stat allocation at chargen — no overlap with ToF stat modifier tables. Install TB before ToF.
conflicts.theirComps: #40000 Class/race restrictions #40610 Druid tables #80000 Ability scores
conflicts.source: TB 3rd_ed_str/dex/con.tpa rewrite strmod/dexmod/hpconbon; ToF ability_scores.tpa rewrites same files; different mechanisms for cn:7000/40000, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: tb#tweaks 3E stat changes and druid equipment overlap with SubtleD Stat Overhauls
conflicts.theirComps: #100 Ability Score #110 Bonus Spell Slots #130 2H Strength #200 XP Tables

conflicts.reason: Removing stat requirements vs IR rebalanced items. IR main (cn:0) No conflict.
Both rewrite stat modifier 2DA files. Last installed wins.
conflicts.theirComps: #7 Revised Strength #8 Revised Dexterity #9 Revised Constitution

ki.description: Intermittent failure — Windows file locking (EACCES) on baldur.bcs during rollback prevents clean uninstall. The component compiles impdiff_serious.d and extends baldur.bcs. Different code path from impdiff.tpa (which has the BCS guard).
ki.workaround: Retry the install. If persistent, close other programs that may lock BCS files (antivirus, file indexers). May succeed on a clean retry.

sum: 26 tweaks covering convenience features, rule changes, and quality-of-life improvements. Individually selectable.

co.no: Fixes Nature's Beauty spell to use 8-hour blindness. Redundant with Spell Revisions.
Changes Imprisonment to permanent maze instead of removing character. Redundant with Spell Revisions.
Patches all .spl files for petrification effects. Redundant with Spell Revisions.

co.n: Drop Weapons in Panic Effect Removal.
co.no: Removes the weapon-dropping side effect from Panic/Horror spells.
co.tp2n: Drop Weapons in Panic Effect Removal.

co.no: DEPRECATED by mod author.
Simplifies Wish spell dialogue. Requires ToB (data/25spells.bif).
Cheesy wish — all wishes available regardless of stats. Requires ToB.
Cheesy Limited Wish for SoA only. FORBID_FILE data/25spells.bif (SoA without ToB).
v Improved difficulty System

Intermittent failure — Windows file locking (EACCES) during rollback prevents clean uninstall. The component compiles impdiff_serious.d and extends baldur.bcs. Different code path from impdiff.tpa (which has the BCS guard). May succeed on retry.
Removes stat requirements from items. Partially working on EE (original items only, not mod-added).
NON-EE ONLY — REQUIRE_FILE ~baldur.exe~ (original engine). Will not install on EET.

co.n: WSPATCK for all: Only for ** and up

co.no: Modifies strmod.2da with 3E-style strength bonuses. OVERWRITTEN by ToF cn:80000 (Ability Score Modifiers) if installed after.
Modifies dexmod.2da with 3E-style dexterity bonuses. OVERWRITTEN by ToF cn:80000 if installed after.
Modifies hpconbon.2da with 3E-style constitution bonuses. OVERWRITTEN by ToF cn:80000 if installed after. Also conflicts with Bart_Tweaks cn:3040.
DEPRECATED by mod author. Modifies intmod.2da.
Modifies mxsplwis.2da with 3E-style wisdom bonuses. OVERWRITTEN by ToF cn:80000 if installed after.
Modifies chrmodst.2da with 3E-style charisma bonuses. OVERWRITTEN by ToF cn:80000 if installed after.
Removes metal armor restriction from druids. Conflicts with cdtweaks cn:2430/2431.

co.n: Gain Stats: 5 pts, nobody over racial max
co.no: Intended for Divine Remix druid components
co.scn: Gain stats as you level up
co.tp2n: 5 points for a full BGT game; nobody can advance over their racial maximum.

co.n: Gain Stats: 5 pts, only PC over racial max

co.no: Adds 5 stat training points in BG2, only PC can exceed racial max.
co.tp2n: 5 points for a full BGT game; only the main character can advance over their racial maximum.

co.scn: Gain stats as you level up
co.tp2n: 5 points for a full BGT game; everybody can advance over their racial maximum.

co.tp2n: One point every 4 levels and one point every chapter; everybody can advance over their racial maximum (@vgur)

co.scn: Gain stats as you level up
co.tp2n: 5 points for a full BGT game; everybody can advance exactly one point over their racial maximum; not retroactive (Quester).
